workflow.name: Generate and email daily AI-powered HR changes digest from SAP SuccessFactors EC with GPT-4o-mini and Gmail
workflow.description:
### How it works

1. Triggers daily or manually for execution.
2. Configures base URL and email settings for SAP SF.
3. Fetches HR change data from SuccessFactors.
4. Aggregates data and checks for errors or changes.
5. Processes results with AI and sends digest or error emails.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Ensure SAP SuccessFactors API credentials are set for data fetching.
- [ ] Configure email settings including recipient for digest and error reporting.
- [ ] Schedule the n8n workflow at an appropriate time, typically early morning.

### Customization

- [ ] Adjust the schedule time and email recipient as per organizational needs.

parameters.content:
## Generate and email daily AI-powered HR changes digest from SAP SuccessFactors EC

### How it works

1. Triggers daily or manually for execution.
2. Configures base URL and email settings for SAP SF.
3. Fetches HR change data from SuccessFactors.
4. Aggregates data and checks for errors or changes.
5. Processes results with AI and sends digest or error emails.

### Setup steps

- [ ] Ensure SAP SuccessFactors API credentials are set for data fetching.
- [ ] Configure email settings including recipient for digest and error reporting.
- [ ] Schedule the n8n workflow at an appropriate time, typically early morning.

### Customization

Adjust the schedule time and email recipient as per organizational needs.

Change from Basic Auth to OAuth 2.0 SAML Bearer Token by combining other templates from me.

## Execution trigger

Triggers the workflow execution either daily or manually.

## Setup configuration

Sets up configuration parameters like base URL and email.

## Fetch HR data

Fetches hire, termination, move, and address data from SuccessFactors.

## Data aggregation

Aggregates fetched data for consistency check.

## Change detection

Detects changes in aggregated data and branches logic.

## AI processing and digest email

Processes data with AI and prepares email if changes detected.

## Error handling

Formats and sends an error report if a critical failure occurs.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'gpt-4o-mini', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $('Create AI Prompt').first().json.systemPrompt }, { role: 'user', content: $('Create AI Prompt').first().json.userPrompt } ], max_tokens: 1200, temperature: 0.3 }) }}

data.details:
The IF node can be used to implement binary conditional logic in your workflow. You can set up one-to-many conditions to evaluate each item of data being inputted into the node. That data will either evaluate to TRUE or FALSE and route out of the node accordingly.

This node has multiple types of conditions: Bool, String, Number, and Date & Time.
